request.description: These `params` control how the **Leboncoin Auto Message Sender** behaves — including message templating, one-time enforcement, and time-based filtering. ➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Leboncoin Auto Message Sender**. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the params Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._ | Parameter | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **message** | string | Template for the message sent to sellers. Supports dynamic variables: `#title#` (listing title) and `#pseudo#` (seller pseudonym). | | **hours_back** | integer or null | Collect only listings posted in the last _X_ hours (e.g., `24`). Set to `null` to disable time-based filtering. | | **max_results** | integer or null | Maximum number of listings to process before stopping. Use `null` for no limit. | | **max_unique_results_per_run** | integer or null | Maximum number of unique results retrieved across all tasks in the entire run. use `null` for unlimited |

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Leboncoin Auto Message Sender**.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **annonce_id** | string | Listing ID on Leboncoin to which the message was targeted. |
| **message** | string | The actual message sent, with `#title#` and `#pseudo#` dynamically substituted. |
| **functions.one_time_message.filling_date** | string | Timestamp when the one-time-message function was executed (`DD/MM/YYYY, HH:mm:ss Z`). |
| **is_sent** | boolean | `true` if the message was successfully sent. |
| **was_already_sent** | boolean or null | `true` if the send was skipped because the same message had already been sent to this listing. |
| **is_deactivated** | boolean | `true` if the listing was deactivated at the time of processing. |
| **last_publication_date** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when the listing was last published or updated. |
| **message_hash** | string or null | Hash of the message content, used to detect and prevent duplicate sends. |
| **url** | string | Direct URL of the Leboncoin listing. |

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
  "total_results": 1,
  "limit": 100,
  "page": 1,
  "total_pages": 1,
  "result_from": 1,
  "result_to": 1,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 32892,
      "object": "result",
      "squid": "939b056f17ea4361b2e129f586e4d215",
      "run": "2508e5e663ff4d739c3d9c5bdbce7639",
      "annonce_id": "2928122417",
      "functions": {
        "one_time_message": {
          "filling_date": "01/31/2025, 15:52:59 +0200"
        }
      },
      "is_deactivated": false,
      "is_sent": true,
      "last_publication_date": "2025-01-31T14:51:12Z",
      "message": "Hello SQUARE HABITAT   CHAUVIGNY,\n\nJe viens de voir votre article qui porte le nom:\nMaison 5 pièces 148 m²\n\nL'offre m'intéresse?\nEst-ce que vous pouvez me recontacter via la messagerie leboncoin?\n\nA très vite,\nSasha",
      "message_hash": null,
      "native_id": 32892,
      "scraping_time": "2025-01-31T14:52:59.369Z",
      "url": "https://www.leboncoin.fr/ad/ventes_immobilieres/2928122417",
      "was_already_sent": null
    }
  ],
  "next": null,
  "previous": null
}
